title: GEOPARTNER Sp. z o.o. and GEOPARTNER GEOMATICS Sp. z o.o.
description: Geopartner Geomatics Sp. z o.o. is a Gdańsk-based engineering firm specializing in advanced surveying, mapping, and BIM services for the infrastructure sector. The company utilizes LiDAR scanners and drones to support road and rail projects, operating in the Polish and Swedish markets. GEOPARTNER Sp. z o.o. is a Polish engineering firm specializing in geophysical and geotechnical services, primarily focused on investigating ground conditions for energy, infrastructure, and mining projects.
